query: Fetch xView1 images from Athens International Airport, Greece. Consider a wide area. Then run the Swin-L detector and finally please zoom the map there!

task0.objective: Fetch xView1 images from Athens International Airport, Greece, covering a wide area.

task1.objective: Run the Swin-L detector on the fetched xView1 images.

task2.objective: Zoom the map to the area around Athens International Airport based on the detection results.
